summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All new Match Report page features and navigation changes working correctly. 10/10 backend tests passed, 8/8 frontend UI tests passed. Match Report page at /match/:fixtureId displays fixture data, event timeline, match statistics, and summary card. Navigation reduced to 6 items (Αγώνες removed). /fixtures redirects to /team?tab=results. Clickable fixtures in Results tab and Overview tab navigate to Match Report.
critical_code_review_comments: MatchReportPage.jsx is well-structured with separate components (MatchStatBar, TimelineEvent)
Event timeline correctly positions home events on left, away events on right
Match summary card correctly calculates goals, events, cards, substitutions from events array
404 state handled gracefully with Greek message 'Ο αγώνας δεν βρέθηκε' and back link
No events/stats states show appropriate Greek messages
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation correctly reduced from 7 to 6 items (Αγώνες removed)
/fixtures route correctly redirects to /team?tab=results using Navigate component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified: 1) Match Report page at /match/:fixtureId with header (teams, score, date, venue, competition), event timeline (goal events positioned correctly), match statistics (shows 'no stats' when null), and summary card (goals, events, cards, subs counts), 2) Navigation reduced to 6 items: Αρχική, Σχετικά, Ομάδα, Ακαδημία, Νέα, Επικοινωνία (Αγώνες removed), 3) /fixtures redirects to /team?tab=results, 4) Results tab fixtures are clickable Links to /match/:id, 5) Overview tab Latest Results are clickable Links to /match/:id, 6) 404 case shows 'Ο αγώνας δεν βρέθηκε' with back link, 7) Test fixture d1053581-dbbd-4dd1-9627-94139566dac8 has 1 goal event (Μάριος Ρούκλας 15')

event_timeline: Event positioned on away side (right) - PASS
match_statistics: Shows 'no stats' message when null - PASS

navigation.items: 6 items (Αρχική, Σχετικά, Ομάδα, Ακαδημία, Νέα, Επικοινωνία) - PASS
